task: Go to https://example.com and tell me the page headline. One sentence.

ours.task: Go to https://example.com and tell me the page headline. One sentence.
ours.answer: The headline of the page is "Example Domain".

theirs.task: Go to https://example.com and tell me the page headline. One sentence.
theirs.answer: The headline of the page at https://example.com is 'Example Domain'.

task: Go to https://example.com and tell me the destination URL of the 'More information...' link.

ours.task: Go to https://example.com and tell me the destination URL of the 'More information...' link.
ours.answer: The destination URL of the 'More information...' (or 'Learn more') link on example.com is https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved.

theirs.task: Go to https://example.com and tell me the destination URL of the 'More information...' link.
theirs.answer: The destination URL of the 'More information...' link (labeled as 'Learn more' on the page) at https://example.com is https://iana.org/domains/example.

task: Go to https://example.org and tell me the page headline. One sentence.

ours.task: Go to https://example.org and tell me the page headline. One sentence.
ours.answer: The headline of the page is "Example Domain".

theirs.task: Go to https://example.org and tell me the page headline. One sentence.
theirs.answer: The headline of the page at https://example.org is 'Example Domain'.

task: Go to https://news.ycombinator.com and tell me the title of the top story. One sentence.

ours.task: Go to https://news.ycombinator.com and tell me the title of the top story. One sentence.
ours.answer: The title of the top story on Hacker News is "Where the goblins came from."

theirs.task: Go to https://news.ycombinator.com and tell me the title of the top story. One sentence.
theirs.answer: The title of the top story on Hacker News is 'Where the goblins came from'.

task: Go to https://news.ycombinator.com and tell me the title and current points of the top story. One sentence.

ours.task: Go to https://news.ycombinator.com and tell me the title and current points of the top story. One sentence.
ours.answer: The top story on Hacker News is "Where the goblins came from," which currently has 379 points.

theirs.task: Go to https://news.ycombinator.com and tell me the title and current points of the top story. One sentence.
theirs.answer: The top story on Hacker News is "Where the goblins came from" with 379 points.

task: Go to https://news.ycombinator.com and tell me the title of the third story.

ours.task: Go to https://news.ycombinator.com and tell me the title of the third story.
ours.answer: The title of the third story on Hacker News is "Zed 1.0".

theirs.task: Go to https://news.ycombinator.com and tell me the title of the third story.
theirs.answer: The title of the third story on Hacker News is "Zed 1.0".

task: Go to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Web_browser and give me the first sentence of the article.

ours.task: Go to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Web_browser and give me the first sentence of the article.
ours.answer: A web browser, often abbreviated as browser, is an application for accessing websites.

theirs.task: Go to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Web_browser and give me the first sentence of the article.
theirs.answer: The first sentence of the Wikipedia article for 'Web browser' is: "A web browser, often abbreviated as browser, is an application for accessing websites."

task: Go to https://httpbin.org/forms/post, fill the customer name field with 'Bench', click submit, then tell me the URL of the resulting page.

ours.task: Go to https://httpbin.org/forms/post, fill the customer name field with 'Bench', click submit, then tell me the URL of the resulting page.
ours.answer: The URL of the resulting page is https://httpbin.org/post.

theirs.task: Go to https://httpbin.org/forms/post, fill the customer name field with 'Bench', click submit, then tell me the URL of the resulting page.
theirs.answer: The URL of the resulting page after submitting the form is https://httpbin.org/post.

task: Go to https://httpbin.org/html and tell me the title of the article on the page.

ours.task: Go to https://httpbin.org/html and tell me the title of the article on the page.
ours.answer: The title of the article on the page is "Herman Melville - Moby-Dick".

theirs.task: Go to https://httpbin.org/html and tell me the title of the article on the page.
theirs.answer: The title of the article on the page is 'Herman Melville - Moby-Dick'.
